guest_sean-ellis: Man in his 50s with short salt-and-pepper hair swept to the side, clean-shaven, fair sun-weathered skin, blue-gray eyes, broad athletic shoulders, black button-up shirt, wearing a calm, confident, quietly assured smile.
guest_alex-komoroske: Man in his 30s with short tousled sandy-blond hair, clean-shaven, fair skin, lean build, wearing a navy polo shirt, flashing a huge open-mouthed grin, radiating energetic, boyish, approachable enthusiasm.
guest_ebi-atawodi: Woman in her 30s with a full natural black afro, deep brown skin, pearl stud earrings, crisp white button-front blouse, beaming a radiant open smile with a charming gap, warm and vibrant presence.
